---
title: "Talks"
editor: visual
---

## **2026**

Invited Panelist, **2026 Asia Pacific Policy Network (AP-PPN) Conference**. Title: *Publishing Strategies in Public Management Journal (the Editor's Forum)* May 2026, Zhou Enlai School of Government, Nankai University, Tianjin, China [<a href="https://www.ippapublicpolicy.org/announcement/call-for-papers-2026-asia-pacific-public-policy-network-agm-tianjin-china/1147"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

Invited Speaker, Title: *LLM as a New Epistemology and How It Will Change Social Sciences.* April 2026, Hosted by Institute of Innovation and Entrepreneurship, Bern University of Applied Sciences, Bern, Switzerland. [<a href="https://www.bfh.ch/en/"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

Keynote Speaker, **22nd Annual Social Entrepreneurship Conference**. Title: *The End of Social Entrepreneurship? A Socio Political Turn and Why We Need it in the Policymakers Toolkits* May 2026, IMD Campus, Lausanne, Switzerland. [<a href="https://www.imd.org/event/social-entrepreneurship/2026-04-30/conference/"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

Invited Speaker, **Lingnan University Dept of Government and Int'l Affairs**. Title: *Public Administration in the Era of GPT: Scale Development and Synthetic Data* Jan 2026, Lingnan University, Hong Kong. [<a href="https://www.ln.edu.hk/gia/f/subsitefrontpage/106821/Public%20Lecture%20on%2022%20JAN%202026.jpg"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

## **2025**

Panel Speaker, **High Level Forum on GenAI Governance and Cultural Co-Creation**. Title: *Citizens Preferences on AI Governance* Oct 2025, Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST), Hong Kong. [<a href="https://hkust-mirc.github.io/GAGCC/"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

Invited Speaker, **Cournot Seminar**. Title: *Experimental Paradigm in Social Entrepreneurship Research* Apr 2025, Bureau d'economie theorique et appliquee, University of Strasbourg, Strasbourg, France. [<a href="https://www.beta-economics.fr/en/evenements/cournot-seminar-yanto-chandra-university-of-hong-kong/"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

## **2024**

Plenary Speaker, **AI and Public Policy International Conference**. Title: *"Government Innovation in the Age of Generative AI: Promise and Pitfalls"* Nanyang Centre for Public Admin, Nanyang Technological University, Nov 2024, Singapore. [<a href="https://cms.lienconference.sg/index/index/detail?id=35"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

## **2023**

Invited Speaker, Title: *Artificial Intelligence as a Method.* Hosted by the Department of Government and Public Administration, University of Macau, Macau SAR, China, 4 December 2023

Keynote Speaker, **The 11th Gadjah Mada International Conference on Economics and Business (GAMAICEB)**. Title: *Blockchain as a New Driver of Social Entrepreneurship* Sept 2024, Yogyakarta, Indonesia. [<a href="https://feb.ugm.ac.id/en/news/4316-ifrs-enforcement-handling-greenwashing-and-blockchain-as-a-driver-of-social-entrepreneurship"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

## **2022**

Keynote Speaker, **APRU Carbon Neutral Society Conference**. Title: *Blockchain as Social Innovation: Smart Contract for P2P Energy Trading* Kyushu University and Association of Pacific Rim Universities (APRU). June 2022, Online. [<a href="https://www.apru.org/event/apru-carbon-neutral-society-action-month/"> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}

## **2021**

Invited Speaker, **Japanese Academic Association of Organizational Science (AAOS)**. Title: *The Promise of Emancipatory Entrepreneuring Research* Aug 2021, Online. [<a href="https://sites.google.com/view/aaos-online-seminar20210806/%E3%83%9B%E3%83%BC%E3%83%A0 "> <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark"></i> Event </a>]{style="white-space: nowrap;"}
